name: Paldi
address: Opp. Manjulal Municipal Garden, next to Adani CNG & Orion Complex, Paldi Cross Roads, Paldi, Ahmedabad – 380007

landmarks.value: Next to Adani CNG pump & Orion Complex
At Paldi Cross Roads (Paldi Char Rasta)

howToReach.value: Located right at Paldi Cross Roads in west Ahmedabad, easily reached from Ellisbridge, Vasna and Ambawadi.
About 8 km from Ahmedabad Junction (Kalupur) railway station and roughly 12 km from Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport.
Well served by AMTS/BRTS bus routes along Paldi; on-street and complex parking available nearby.

intro: Paldi is where Bavishi Fertility Institute began in 1998 — and remains our flagship head office. This centre houses our most advanced Class 1000 embryology lab, senior promoter doctors and the full spectrum of fertility services under one roof, in the heart of west Ahmedabad.

faqs.q: Where is the Bavishi Fertility Institute Paldi IVF centre?
faqs.a: It is at Paldi Cross Roads — opposite Manjulal Municipal Garden, next to Adani CNG & Orion Complex, Paldi, Ahmedabad – 380007. This is Bavishi Fertility Institute's head office and flagship lab, established in 1998.

faqs.q: What are the timings at the Paldi centre?
faqs.a: The Paldi centre is open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 am to 7:00 pm. Appointments are recommended; call +91 97126 22288 to book.

faqs.q: Which areas does the Paldi centre serve?
faqs.a: Paldi conveniently serves patients from Paldi, Vasna, Ambawadi, Ellisbridge, Vejalpur and Maninagar, as well as families travelling from across Ahmedabad and Gujarat.

faqs.q: What facilities are available at Paldi?
faqs.a: A Class 1000 embryology & IVF lab, andrology lab, in-house diagnostics and sonography, a day-care operation theatre, counselling and nutrition suites, and an on-site pharmacy — everything under one roof.

faqs.q: Why choose the Paldi centre for IVF?
faqs.a: As the flagship head office, Paldi offers the institute's most advanced lab, senior promoter doctors and over three decades of experience — combined with transparent pricing, EMI options and the Suraksha Kavach package.
